creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
ports, new port submission, security/sagan
	PLEASE NOTE: this port submission depends on
	another new port submission which must be accepted
	into the tree either beforehand or with this one.
	The PR for that submission is 173544.  The port is
	devel/liblognorm.

Fix: --- UIDs.orig	2012-11-11 04:21:42.000000000 +0000
+++ UIDs	2012-11-11 06:29:02.000000000 +0000
@@ -155,6 +155,7 @@
 drweb:*:426:426::0:0:Dr.Web Mail Scanner:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
 quasselcore:*:442:442::0:0:Quassel IRC User:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
 callweaver:*:444:444::0:0:Callweaver account:/var/lib/callweaver:/usr/sbin/nologin
+sagan:*:450:450::0:0:Sagan account:/var/account/sagan:/usr/sbin/nologin
 courier:*:465:465::0:0:Courier Mail Server:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
 condor:*:466:466::0:0:& user:/var/db/condor:/usr/sbin/nologin
 netmon:*:467:467::0:0:Network monitor account:/var/netmon:/usr/sbin/nologin
--- UIDs.diff ends here ---
